title: EEGEyeNet Dataset

funding_references.funder_name: Schweizerischer Nationalfonds zur Förderung der Wissenschaftlichen Forschung

description: EEGEyeNet is a simultaneous electroencephalography and eye-tracking dataset designed for eye movement prediction research. This BIDS-standardized version contains data from a single subject collected during concurrent EEG and eye-tracking acquisition, derived from the larger EEGEyeNet dataset (Kastrati et al., 2021). The dataset provides a benchmark resource for developing and evaluating computational models of eye movement behavior using multimodal neurophysiological recordings.
methods_description: Data were collected using simultaneous electroencephalography (EEG) and eye-tracking acquisition. The study received ethical approval from the Institutional Review Board of Canton Zurich (BASEC-Nr. 2017-00226). This BIDS version was prepared by reformatting a single-subject subset from the original EEGEyeNet dataset.
